core.title: Medical Marketing
core.description: SEO and digital marketing for medical, dental, and health practices. YMYL compliance, E-E-A-T structure, and patient acquisition in a high-stakes vertical.

content.about: The medical marketing cluster is one of the most demanding verticals in SEO. This channel documents the real work of building authority, structure, and patient acquisition systems that survive Google updates.
content.what_to_expect: Schema architecture for medical entities, E-E-A-T content strategy, local SEO for practice groups, and YMYL compliance decisions.

seo.meta_description: SEO and digital marketing for medical practices. YMYL compliance, E-E-A-T structure, and real patient acquisition strategy.
